name: PRINCIPAL FINANCIAL GROUP INC
summary: PART I Principal Financial Group, Inc. (PFG) is a leader in global financial services offering businesses, individuals and institutional clients a wide range of financial products and services, including retirement, asset management and workplace benefits and protection solutions through our diverse family of financial services companies.
